attempt_description: Use simulation engine as absolute forecaster for policy outcomes.
replacement_decision: Reposition simulation as comparative scenario engine with explicit uncertainty caveats.
impact: Absolute forecast claims disallowed; scenario deltas prioritized.

attempt_description: Rely on edge direction predictions as high-confidence policy guidance.
replacement_decision: Flag direction as low-trust and require corroboration from multiple scenarios and external evidence.
impact: Direction-only claims blocked in public outputs.

attempt_description: Assume narrow confidence intervals are calibrated for deployment decisions.
replacement_decision: Use conservative interval widening and report uncertainty caveats in all findings outputs.
impact: CI interpretation policy updated; confidence caveats mandatory.

attempt_description: Initial panel pipeline encountered severe sample-dropout under naive temporal completeness handling.
replacement_decision: Adopt strict per-country temporal coverage filtering before downstream modeling.
impact: Feature engineering and selection stages reworked around panel-density constraints.
